name: afnan-mahmud-course-landing
comment: This app intentionally has NO node_modules of its own. It shares the repo-root install: npm run scripts add ancestor node_modules/.bin to PATH, and all @/* imports resolve to repo-root files that resolve their deps (mongoose, next, react) against the ROOT node_modules — guaranteeing a single mongoose instance. Do NOT run `npm install` inside this folder. Build/run from here after a root `npm install`.
